chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No. D- 202 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.04.2025. Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Sindh. *********** Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not wish to press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan/PA
